deals.title: Gratis Open-Air-Festival mit 200+ Music Acts, freiem Eintrit
deals.description: Ksenia • Content Creator auf Instagram: "Donauinselfest officially began in Vienna this Friday! ✨🎡 Find the full program on @donauinselfest_wien 📍Where? Between Donauinsel U1 & Handelskai U6 ⏰ When? The whole day between July 3 - July 5 So many free activities, freebies, 200+ music acts on 16 stages! #viennaspots #viennathingstodo #whattodoinvienna #donaui Quelle: Instagram/Public Search.
